title: CallLint Action Descriptor
description: calllint.action.v0 — Normalized descriptor for a planned external action (email send, API mutation, payment, etc.) to be inspected by `calllint action inspect`. See ADR 0029.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Must be exactly 'calllint.action.v0'.

kind.description: The action kind. Closed vocabulary for v0; each kind maps to a risk-symbol profile and detector set. See ADR 0029 §2.

parameters.description: Kind-specific parameters describing the action (recipient, amount, target, scope). Shape varies by kind. See ADR 0029 §1 for per-kind schemas (to be expanded in implementation phase).

metadata.description: Observed context: header keys, attachment hashes, lengths, OAuth scopes, provenance. Never full payload content (no email body text, attachment bytes, payment memo). Optional but recommended.

header_keys.description: Header keys (e.g. 'Authorization', 'X-API-Token') for secret-shape detection. Values omitted.

attachment_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of attachments (email.forward / email.reply). Required when has_attachments=true.

subject_length.description: Character count of subject line (email kinds). For hidden-char detection.

body_length.description: Character count of body (email/message kinds). Never the literal content.

provenance.description: Optional source attribution: agent session, workflow step, timestamp.
